description: Semantic cache validation plan -- threshold tuning methodology for the 0.92 cosine similarity cutoff (TC-17: cached images acceptable 90% of the time), cross-slot contamination test procedure (TC-18: slot_type filter prevents subject/sky confusion), cache hit rate measurement at steady state (TC-19: 30-60% after 50+ videos), and embedding+query latency benchmark (TC-20: under 500ms per image).
notes: Tier 6 validation plan. Covers TC-17, TC-18, TC-19, TC-20.
